india_trends.title: India to launch 15th round of commercial coal mine auctions on April 17
india_trends.summary: The Ministry of Coal will launch the 15th round of commercial coal mine auctions on April 17, alongside a stakeholder consultation in Mumbai, as part of efforts to boost domestic coal production and strengthen energy security.

india_trends.title: Gallantt Ispat shares soar 56% in just 1 month! Time to book profit or buy more?
india_trends.summary: Gallantt Ispat shares have surged nearly 60% in a month, hitting a fresh 52-week high on the BSE. Strong Q4 production growth and a bullish technical setup are driving momentum, with analysts eyeing further upside toward Rs 900–950 while advising caution on risk-reward at higher levels.

india_trends.title: Global Markets | Japan's Nikkei jumps to record high on Mideast peace hopes; Daikin surges
india_trends.summary: Optimism over easing Middle East tensions pushed Japan’s Nikkei to record highs, with strong gains in Daikin Industries driving the rally.

india_trends.title: New focus to be on attracting domestic capital, says IVCA chair Srini Srinivasan
india_trends.summary: New IVCA chair Srini Srinivasan outlines plans to channel pension and insurance money into AIFs, ease accreditation norms, and address private credit risks amid industry shifts.
